en_title: Doctor Who Likely Now Off Air For Years, as Report Suggests Production Companies Cautious About Continuing Series
subtitle: 2028年再见？
opus_summary: 昨日BBC突然宣布取消《神秘博士》圣诞特辑，确认Russell T Davies与Bad Wolf退出，剧集进入无限期停摆。报道称分手因剧集需要彻底手术，多家制作公司因剧情争议和预算腰斩（每集约300万美元(约合人民币2037万元)）而犹豫接手。回归最早2028年，停播或长达五年，但该剧终将重启。

paragraphs.en: Doctor Who is unlikely to return on-screen for up to five years, a new report has suggested.
paragraphs.cn: 一份新报告指出，《神秘博士》在未来五年内都难以重返荧幕。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, the BBC stunned fans by confirming that its previously-announced Doctor Who Christmas special had been scrapped , as the rights to produce future series were now being offered to other production companies. The announcement also acknowledged the departure of veteran showrunner Russell T Davies and production studio Bad Wolf — effectively placing the show on indefinite hiatus.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，BBC震惊了粉丝，确认其此前宣布的《神秘博士》圣诞特辑已被取消，未来剧集的制作权现正提供给其他制作公司。公告还承认了资深剧集主管Russell T Davies和制作公司Bad Wolf的退出——这实际上让该剧陷入了无限期停播。

paragraphs.en: Now, Deadline has reported that the breakup between the BBC, Russell T Davies and Bad Wolf was a mutual decision, based on the realization that Doctor Who "required a level of surgery that could not be masked by the sticking plaster of a festive episode."
paragraphs.cn: 现在，Deadline报道称，BBC、Russell T Davies和Bad Wolf之间的分手是共同决定，源于他们意识到《神秘博士》“需要一场无法用节日特辑这贴创可贴掩盖的大手术”。

paragraphs.en: Many fans had assumed the Christmas episode would have been Davies' swansong, with the one-off special announced simply to wrap up his remaining plot threads — such as the unexplained reappearance of Billie Piper, whose role may now never be established.
paragraphs.cn: 许多粉丝原本以为圣诞特辑会是Davies的告别之作，宣布这个一次性特别节目只是为了收尾他剩余的剧情线索——比如Billie Piper令人费解的再次现身，她的角色现在可能永远无法明确了。

paragraphs.en: Whether she was playing the Doctor or not, though, the episode would likely have been expected to establish who exactly is the Doctor now, following the departure of Ncuti Gatwa's incarnation. It may be that the answer to that question simply could not be determined in time to produce an episode this year — or that it is a question the BBC would now rather leave to the series' next showrunner.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，无论她是否扮演博士，这集预计都会确定在Ncuti Gatwa的化身离开后，现在究竟谁是博士。也许这个问题的答案根本无法及时在年内制作出一集——又或者，BBC现在更愿意把这个问题留给该剧的下一任剧集主管。

paragraphs.en: Whatever is the case, clearly it has been decided that the show's future will be served best by starting afresh — and this will take time, even starting sooner rather than later. Deadline reported that "2028 at the earliest" was the soonest fans could hope for, though this was "an outside bet." Another production source suggested a hiatus of up to five years, which the series could use to take a proper break.
paragraphs.cn: 无论如何，显然已经决定，该剧的未来最好重新开始——而这需要时间，即使尽早动手也是如此。Deadline报道称，“最早2028年”是粉丝们能期待的最快时间，尽管这只是“一种不太靠谱的猜测”。另一位制作方消息人士建议停播长达五年，让该系列可以真正休息一下。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to several unnamed production companies involved in making UK drama, however, Deadline found hesitation about taking the show on, after concerns over recent storylines and Davies' "sledgehammer" approach to tackling topics of diversity.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Deadline在与几家不愿具名的英国电视剧制作公司交谈时发现，由于担心近期的剧情以及Davies在处理多样性话题时采用的“大锤”式做法，它们对接手该剧犹豫不决。

paragraphs.en: "You would have to be mad," one source said. "[It's a] bit of a nightmare for any producer in this market with the shadow of the Disney fallout ," said another. A third suggested the series' budget would likely be around $3 million per episode — half of the budget for the episodes Disney previously funded.
paragraphs.cn: “你一定是疯了，”一位消息人士说。“在当前市场，有迪士尼闹剧的阴影，这对任何制片人来说都有点像噩梦，”另一位说。第三位消息人士表示，该剧每集预算可能在300万美元(约合人民币2150万元)左右——是迪士尼之前资助剧集预算的一半。

paragraphs.en: The report tallies with comments from former Doctor Who Magazine editor Tom Spilsbury, who last year suggested it would likely be "five or six years before we see anything new," as the series' next incarnation is determined. "At which point, it will be the children of 2005 who will be bringing the show back, just as Russell predicted. As ever, time will tell."
paragraphs.cn: 该报道与前《神秘博士》杂志编辑Tom Spilsbury的评论吻合，他去年曾表示，在该系列确定下一版期间，“大概五年或六年后我们才能看到任何新内容”。“到那时，将是2005年的孩子们把这部剧带回来，正如Russell所预测的那样。一如既往，时间会证明一切。”

paragraphs.en: That said, there seems to be no doubt that Doctor Who will eventually regenerate. While it may take years, the series' long-running nature, adaptable format and large fanbase make it feel inevitable — even if fans have to go the long way around.
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，似乎毫无疑问，《神秘博士》最终会重生。虽然可能需要数年时间，但该剧源远流长的历史、灵活可变的格式和庞大的粉丝基础让它感觉不可避免——哪怕粉丝们不得不多走一些弯路。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或者在Bluesky上找到他。
